overall.description: First-person gameplay footage of a character ascending a snowy mountain path during a nighttime snowstorm. The video shows continuous movement up stone stairs and snow-covered trails through rocky terrain and pine forests in a game engine environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky mountain pass with stone stairs

agents.ego_description: climbing snow-covered stone stairs through a narrow rocky passage flanked by cliffs

entered.detail: stone stairs covered in snow forming the main path upward
large snow-dusted rock face forming the right wall of the passage
snow-covered evergreen trees visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow, enclosed mountain pass with snow-covered stone stairs ascending between rocky cliffs. Heavy snow falls as the camera moves steadily forward and upward through the passage, with pine trees visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested mountain trail with stone stairs

events.description: character turns left to follow the winding mountain path
path opens slightly to reveal distant mountain vista on the left

agents.ego_description: continuing ascent while turning left through a denser forested area with larger trees

entered.detail: distant snow-covered mountain range becoming visible through the trees
prominent snow-laden evergreen tree trunk close to the path

segments.scene_description: The character continues ascending while turning left into a more forested section with denser pine trees. Around 18 seconds, the path curves revealing a distant mountain vista, and the terrain shifts from enclosed rocky cliffs to a more open forest trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain ridge with panoramic views

events.description: exits dense forest into wide open mountain ridge with expansive views
passes fallen logs and snow-covered boulders in open terrain

agents.ego_description: traversing an open snowfield with intermittent stone stairs while approaching a rocky outcrop

entered.detail: expansive range of snow-capped mountains visible in the distance
snow-covered fallen tree trunks lying across the snowfield

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up to a wide mountain ridge with panoramic views of distant snow-capped peaks. The path crosses open snowfields with fallen logs and scattered boulders before returning to stone stairs, transitioning from dense forest to exposed alpine terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep rocky mountain ascent with stone stairs

events.description: path steepens requiring more vigorous ascent

agents.ego_description: climbing steep stone stairs along a rocky cliff face with misty valleys visible below

entered.detail: fog-filled valley visible below the mountain path
tall rocky peak rising above the trail on the right

segments.scene_description: The final segment returns to a narrower, steeper ascent with stone stairs cutting through rocky terrain. The path runs alongside a cliff face with misty valleys visible below, climbing toward higher elevations as the snow continues to fall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous ascent from a claustrophobic mountain pass into a wide alpine vista before returning to a steep, narrow climb. It begins by moving steadily upward through snow-covered stone stairs enclosed by rocky cliffs and heavy snowfall. As the camera turns left, the environment shifts from the narrow passage into a denser pine forest, where the path curves to reveal a distant mountain horizon. The scene then opens onto a wide mountain ridge with panoramic views of snow-capped peaks, crossing open snowfields and fallen logs before transitioning back to stone stairs. Finally, the path narrows again, climbing steeply alongside a cliff face with misty valleys visible below as the ascent continues toward higher elevations.
